sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n98650" key="sumperipe/tomai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συμπερι-πέτομαι</orth>, <sense id="n98650.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fly about with</tr_>, ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2001.tlg019:233a" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">19.233a</biblScope> </bibl> (with vv.ll.).</sense> </entryFree>
